items.acceptanceCriteria: GENERAL REQUIREMENT Equipment document is available 1.1.1 Daily pre-operational inspection checklists are 1.1.2 checked (if applicable) Preventive Maintenance is established and 1.1.3 updated records are maintained Previous inspection reports are checked 1.1.4

INSIDE OF CAR Door reopening device is operating correctly 1.2.1 On passenger elevators a stop switch either key operated or behind a locked cover is provided in 1.2.2 the car and located in or adjacent to the car operating panel. All operating control devices are of the enclosed ASME 1.2.3 electric type ASME Sills are of the correct type and are of sufficient strength and clearance with adjoining car platform 1.2.4 or hoist way sill (min. clearance 13mm) Car has minimum of two lamps (min. of 50 lux for ASME passenger and 25 lux for freight elevators) 1.2.5 8.11.2.1.1e (Passenger elevators shall have auxiliary lighting which automatically turns on if normal power fails ) Saudi Aramco: Saudi Aramco: Company General Use

MACHINE ROOM The access to the machine space is in ASME 1.3.1 conformance with the type of access, location , and 2.7.3.1, combustibility allowed Minimum headroom clearance is either 84" , 53", ASME 1.3.2 42", or 35" depending on type and location of machine room / hoist way Electric lighting in the machine room is not less than 200 lux at floor level and the control switch is ASME 1.3.3 at the lock - jamb side of the access door wherever practicable Saudi Aramco: Saudi Aramco: Company General Use

TOP OF CAR ASME Top of car stop switch is provided and operational 1.4.1 Car of top light and outlet are provided and ASME 1.4.2 operational Top of car operating device is provided (for ASME 1.4.3 inspection purposes) Top of car clearance and refuge space dimensions ASME 1.4.4 vary for the former, minimum 43" for the latter Terminal stopping devices are provided and ASME arranged to slow down and stop the car 2.25.2, 1.4.5 automatically at or near the top and bottom 8.10.2.3.2k, terminal landings (with up to rated load) and at a speed attained in normal operation Saudi Aramco: Saudi Aramco: Company General Use

Outside Hoist way Car platform guard plates comply with material ASME 1.5.1 specification (steel ) and thickness ( not less than 1.5 mm ) ASME Hoist way doors operate correctly 1.5.2 Car vision panel (if fitted) is 0.1sq.m. (max) and either wire-glass or laminated, and in the case of ASME glass doors be laminated , safety glass or safety 1.5.3 plastic , with not less than 60% of the total visible door panel surface area as glass. Hoist way door locking devices are operational 1.5.4 (interlocks) Sec: Saudi Aramco: Saudi Aramco: Company General Use
Elevator Pit ASME The pit access, lighting and stop switch meet 1.6.1 design requirements Saudi Aramco: Saudi Aramco: Company General Use

Firefighters' Service Verify / check operation of elevators under fire and ASME other emergency conditions (A17.1b- 1973 through 2.13.5, 1.7.1 A17.1b- 1980) Saudi Aramco: Saudi Aramco: Company General Use

Inside of Car 2.1.1 Door reopening device is operating correctly 2.13(3.13), Emergency stop switches are not provided on passenger elevators but are provided on freight 2.1.2 elevators, in the car and in or adjacent to each car operating panel All operating control devices are of the enclosed 2.1.3 2.26.1.1(3.26.1), electric type Sills are of the correct type and are of sufficient 2.5.1(3.5), 2.1.4 strength and clearance with adjoining car platform or hoist way sill (min. clearance 13mm) 2.15.16 Car has minimum of two lamps (min. of 50 lux for passenger and 25 lux for freight elevators) 2.1.5 (Passenger elevators shall have auxiliary lighting Sec: which automatically turns on if normal power fails) Car emergency communication signal to ASME authorized and emergency personnel is available 2.1.6 and working Saudi Aramco: Saudi Aramco: Company General Use

Machine Room Access to the machine space is in conformance ASME 2.2.1 with the type of access, location , and combustibility allowed Minimum headroom clearance is either 84" , 53", ASME 42", or 35" depending on type and location of 2.2.2 machine room / hoist way Electric lighting in the machine room is not less than 200 lux at floor level and the control switch is ASME 2.2.3 at the lock - jamb side of the access door wherever practicable Strength and construction of the floor of the ASME machine room, windows, skylights and fire 2.2.4 (3.7), resistance is in accordance with the relevant building code ASME 2.2.5 Housekeeping is adequate 8.6.4.8 Ventilation (natural or forced) complies with the various opening and size requirements as well as ASME 2.2.6 air change volume per minute (for forced (3.7), ventilation) Saudi Aramco: Saudi Aramco: Company General Use

Top of Car ASME 2.3.1 Car top stop switch is provided and operational ASME 2.3.2 Car top light and outlet is provided and operational Car top operating device is provided (for inspection ASME 2.3.3 purposes) ASME Car top clearance and refuge space dimensions: 2.3.4 varies for the former: minimum 43" for the latter 8.10.3.2.3d, Saudi Aramco: Saudi Aramco: Company General Use

Outside Hoist way Car platform guard plates comply with material specification (steel ) and thickness (not less than 2.4.1 Sec: 1.5 mm) ASME (3.11), Hoist way doors operate correctly 2.4.2 (3.12), Car vision panel (if fitted) is 0.1sq.m. (max) and either wire-glass or laminated, and in the case of ASME 2.4.3 glass doors be laminated , safety glass or safety plastic , with not less than 60% of the total visible door panel surface area as glass. Hoist way door locking devices are operational ASME 2.4.4 (interlocks) Access to hoist way (at top or bottom landing) is by ASME 2.4.5 use of an access switch adjacent to the entrance 2.12.7 ASME 2.4.6 Hoist way doors are power closing 2.13.6 Saudi Aramco: Saudi Aramco: Company General Use

Elevator Pit ASME Pit access, lighting and stop switch meet design 2.5.1 requirements Verify bottom clearance, In no case shall the available refuge space be less than either of the ASME 2.5.2 following (a) a horizontal area of 600 mm x 1 200 mm with a height of 600 mm (b) a horizontal area of 450 mm x 900 mm with a height of 1 070 mm. Normal terminal stopping devices operate correctly ASME to slow down and operate the car correctly at or 8.11.2.2.5 2.5.3 near top and bottom terminal landings (up to rated load and speed) Saudi Aramco: Saudi Aramco: Company General Use
